title: Totem Pikachu
description: make your totem look like Pikachu
body:
Totem Pikachu is a fun and creative resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s classic Totem of Undying with a custom-made Pikachu design.
This pack adds a bright, energetic touch to your survival experience by turning the totem into a miniature version of Pikachu — complete with glowing cheeks, cute eyes, and electric-style particle effects.

Perfect for players who love Pokémon or want to personalize their game with something cheerful and unique.
Whether you’re recording content, streaming, or just playing for fun, this totem brings an adorable spark to your world!
